text: What if I told you corals have hidden allies? Meet the coral microbiome, a complex community of bacteria, fungi, and viruses living on corals. These microorganisms are crucial for coral health, helping them fight diseases and adapt to stress. Studies show that a healthy microbiome can even enhance coral resilience against climate change. But here's the catch: our understanding of these interactions is still evolving, filled with uncertainties. Want to dive deeper into coral ecosystems? Hit that follow button!
